title: Operating-company DCF
purpose: Estimate enterprise and equity value from explicit operating cash-flow assumptions.
business_questions: What enterprise value follows from the forecast cash flows?
What equity value remains after the net-debt bridge?
does_not_answer: Should the user invest or transact?
What price will a buyer or market pay?
appropriate_uses: Acquisition valuation support when an operating forecast exists
Sensitivity analysis around explicit valuation assumptions
inappropriate_uses: Valuation without a supportable operating forecast
Automatic use of an unexplained discount rate
common_misunderstandings: A DCF result is not an investment recommendation.
A mathematically valid terminal value may still depend on unsuitable assumptions.
